creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
12-STABLE is past EOL now. For future reference build failures are best reported on the freebsd-stable [1] or freebsd-current [2] mailing list (as appropriate).

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-stable
[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-current
